label: District name
description: District (woreda) name. Real-ish names for the 17 treated woredas (Table A1); systematic placeholders for controls.
how_created: Treated names from Appendix Table A1; controls '<region> woreda <id>'.
notes: Treated names approximate the host woredas of the parks.

label: Region
how_created: Hand-coded for treated (Table A1); allocated to controls in proportion to park presence.

label: Region ID
description: Integer code for the region (region-by-year FE key).

label: Treated dummy
description: 1 if the district ever hosts an industrial park.

label: Park opening year
description: Calendar year the district's first park opened (NaN for controls).
notes: Defines staggered treatment timing; NaN for never-treated.

label: Treatment indicator
description: 1 if district is treated AND year >= open_year (Eq. 1 D_dt).
notes: The DiD treatment variable; stays 1 once on.

label: Nearby dummy
description: 1 if a control district is within 10 km of an operational park in that year (Table 2 spillover).
how_created: A few controls flagged in post years; carry NO treatment effect.

label: Event time k
description: Years since opening, clipped to [-5,+5] (NaN for controls).

label: Post dummy
description: Equals the treatment indicator (1 once a district's park is open).

label: Nighttime light
how_created: Two-part DGP: extensive Bernoulli x intensive bright-base + treatment ramp.

label: IHS light
description: Inverse hyperbolic sine of light_intensity, asinh(light).

label: Impervious ratio
description: Impervious surface area / district land area (urbanization).
how_created: Additive ramp + shared-urbanization trend; observed only 2005/2010/2015/2020.

label: Distance to nearest city
description: Distance to the nearest large (top-50) city.

label: Labor-intensive park
description: 1 if the treated district's park is labor-intensive (NaN for controls).

label: Public park
description: 1 if the treated district's park is publicly owned (NaN for controls).

label: Chinese aid
description: 1 if the district received infrastructure-related Chinese ODA (from first receipt).

label: Transport project
description: 1 if a major transport project traverses the district (from completion).
